summary.lv: Epson Europe BV jaunajā Rīgas EBS centrā meklē Customer and Service Support Administrator, kas apstrādā servisa rēķinus, atskaites un rezerves daļu pasūtījumus, kā arī risina klientu sūdzības starptautiskā vidē.
summary.en: Epson Europe BV's new Riga EBS centre is hiring a Customer and Service Support Administrator to process service invoices, reports and spare-part orders, and handle customer complaints across an international team.
